conditionality: Cr2 is a target/input surface until its input field is constructed without new hypotheses.
final_bounded_status_phrase: Distance/factorization surface closed constructively; guarded locality pipeline closed in the bounded/restricted sense with explicit conditional hypotheses; directed symmetry treated as archival-only; noncomputable surface documented without constructivization obligation; unguarded frontier boundary witnessed by negative test object only; general FMT frontier, unguarded FO locality, Fagin, 0-1 Law, and all external validation remain permanently open and out of scope.
nonclaims: Cr2 does not by itself prove unguarded FO locality.
Cr2 does not by itself prove full Gaifman locality.
Cr2 does not by itself prove Fagin theorem or 0-1 Law.
Cr2 does not by itself prove repository-level final FMT closure.
Cr2 does not assert external validation.
